scripts.start-mesh: concurrently -n "TL,TR,BL,BR,GW" -c "bgBlue,bgGreen,bgYellow,bgMagenta,bgCyan" "cross-env ZONE=TOP_LEFT node simulator.js" "cross-env ZONE=TOP_RIGHT node simulator.js" "cross-env ZONE=BOTTOM_LEFT node simulator.js" "cross-env ZONE=BOTTOM_RIGHT node simulator.js" "node gateway.js"
